# @template/core — AI Agent Ruleset

> **Scope**: `@template/core` — Business logic, auth provider, Supabase client, stores

### Auto-invoke Skills

When performing these actions, ALWAYS invoke the corresponding skill FIRST:

<!-- auto-generated by sync.sh -->

| Action | Skill |
|--------|-------|
| Creating/modifying Zustand stores | `zustand-5` |
| Working with TypeScript types or interfaces | `typescript` |
| Working with Zod schemas imported from contracts | `zod-4` |

---

## CRITICAL RULES — NON-NEGOTIABLE

### Auth Provider Pattern (Dependency Injection)

The auth system uses an **abstract provider interface**, not direct Supabase calls.

```
AuthProvider (interface)
├── MockAuthProvider   → Default: in-memory auth for development
├── SupabaseAuthProvider → Production: real Supabase Auth
└── (future providers) → Clerk, Kinde, NextAuth, etc.
```

**Rules**:
- ✅ ALWAYS code against the `AuthProvider` interface, never against Supabase directly.
- ✅ The mock provider is the DEFAULT — no external services needed for dev.
- ❌ NEVER import `@supabase/supabase-js` outside of `src/supabase/` or `src/auth/providers/`.
- ❌ NEVER expose Supabase types in the public API of this package.

### Supabase Client Encapsulation

Supabase client creation is encapsulated in `src/supabase/`:
- `createBrowserClient()` — for client components
- `createServerClient()` — for Server Actions and middleware
- These are the ONLY places where `@supabase/supabase-js` is imported.

### Store Conventions (Zustand 5)

- Stores live in `src/stores/`.
- ✅ Use `useShallow` for multi-property selectors.
- ✅ Use `persist` middleware for stores that survive page refresh.
- ✅ Define typed selectors alongside the store.
- ❌ NEVER subscribe to the entire store object.

---

## PACKAGE STRUCTURE

```
packages/core/src/
├── index.ts              # Barrel export
├── auth/
│   ├── index.ts          # Public auth API
│   ├── types.ts          # AuthProvider interface, AuthUser type
│   ├── providers/
│   │   ├── mock.ts       # MockAuthProvider (default)
│   │   └── supabase.ts   # SupabaseAuthProvider (opt-in)
│   └── context.ts        # Auth context/provider setup
├── supabase/
│   ├── browser.ts        # createBrowserClient
│   └── server.ts         # createServerClient
├── stores/
│   └── *.ts              # Zustand stores
└── utils/
    └── *.ts              # Shared utility functions
```

---

## EXPORTS

```typescript
// From @template/core
export { AuthProvider, MockAuthProvider } from "./auth"

// From @template/core/auth
export { AuthProvider, AuthUser, MockAuthProvider, SupabaseAuthProvider } from "./auth"

// From @template/core/supabase/*
export { createBrowserClient } from "./supabase/browser"
export { createServerClient } from "./supabase/server"

// From @template/core/stores/*
export { useAuthStore } from "./stores/auth-store"

// From @template/core/utils/*
export { cn } from "./utils/cn"
```

---

*For auth patterns → See `src/auth/types.ts`. For architecture → see `lighthouse-architecture.mdx`.*
